test_cases.label: Web Portal Registration
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3001 and navigate to the Sign Up / Register page. Fill in all visible form fields: full name 'Test User', phone number '07{{RANDOM_6_DIGITS}}' (or '0771234999' if RANDOM_6_DIGITS is unavailable), email 'test{{RANDOM_6_DIGITS}}@example.com', business/shop name 'Test Shop', password 'Test@12345', confirm password 'Test@12345'. If a terms-and-conditions checkbox is present use await page.locator("input[type='checkbox']").first.check() — do NOT use .click() or .evaluate() on checkboxes as the app uses React and needs the proper change event. Then click the Sign Up / Register button. After clicking wait at least 3 seconds. Return 'SUCCESS' if ANY of the following is true: (1) URL navigates away from the signup page, (2) a success or welcome message appears, (3) an OTP, phone verification, or two-factor prompt appears anywhere on the page, (4) text like 'already registered', 'already exists', or 'account exists' appears, (5) the key 'verifications' appears in localStorage (even with value 'undefined' — this indicates the server processed the signup and triggered a verification flow), (6) the Sign Up button was clicked and NO visible validation error or red error text is present on the page. Only return FAIL if a visible field validation error or explicit server error message is shown that prevented the form from being submitted.

test_cases.label: Web Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3001 and log in using identifier {{WEB_PHONE}} (mobile/username) and password {{WEB_PASSWORD}}. If placeholders are missing/unresolved, use fallback identifier '0771234999' and password 'Test@12345'. Fill the primary login identity field first (mobile/phone/username). If the response/error mentions '"user_name" is missing', explicitly fill the username field (selectors like input[name='user_name'], input[name*='user']) with the same identifier and retry Sign In. If identifier starts with +94 or 94, retry using local format 0XXXXXXXXX; if local format fails, retry once with +94XXXXXXXXX. Wait at least 3 seconds after each submit. Return 'SUCCESS' if any of these occurs: (1) URL changes away from /login, (2) dashboard/home content appears, (3) OTP/verification page appears (valid post-auth step). Return FAIL only when a visible login/auth error remains and page stays on /login after trying all identifier formats and the explicit user_name retry.

test_cases.label: Web Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on http://95.111.238.19:3001 already logged in (phone={{WEB_PHONE}}, password={{WEB_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed; use fallback 0771234999 / Test@12345 if placeholders are missing). If the app lands on OTP/verification step, treat that as authenticated progress and continue best-effort smoke checks for available modules. Open at least five distinct navigation modules when available, perform safe read-only interactions in each (search, filter, or open a detail view), and confirm there are no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3002 and log in using username {{ADMIN_USERNAME}} and password {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}. Stop as soon as the admin dashboard or home screen is visible. Return 'SUCCESS' if login worked, otherwise describe what went wrong.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on http://95.111.238.19:3002 already logged in (username={{ADMIN_USERNAME}}, password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed). Open at least five distinct admin modules, perform safe read-only interactions in each, and confirm no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.

workflows.label: Web Regression
workflows.description: Registration, login, and smoke checks for web portal
